case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ARTURO MARTINEZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-10-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ARTURO MARTINEZ PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUKIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE: $50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ PEREZ, ARTURO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ PEREZ, ARTURO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ARTURO MARTINEZ PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
